svg.title: Redfearn Group: Icon Only, opaque black and white
svg.desc: Opaque black-and-white two-tone version: a solid black badge with genuine white (not cream) letterforms, and a solid black wordmark. Both colors are baked in as real fills, not a knockout cutout, so it reproduces correctly on any backdrop rather than only reading as black-and-white over a literal white surface. Real Space Grotesk Bold and JetBrains Mono Medium vector outlines, no font dependency.
